questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The Geometry Guard tower base is a square. How many sides does a square have?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: An enemy walks in a straight line. What type of geometric line never ends in both directions?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The tower's range forms a circle around it. What shape is that?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A tower's range covers a full turn around it. How many degrees is a full turn?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The map tile is a square with sides of 64 pixels. What is its perimeter?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: Two walls meet at a corner forming a right angle. How many degrees is a right angle?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A rectangular build zone is 5 tiles wide and 3 tiles tall. What is its area in tiles?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The splash radius of a mortar is a circle with radius 60 pixels. What is the diameter?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A triangular synergy zone has angles of 60 and 80 degrees. What is the third angle?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The Geometry Guard's range is a circle with radius 280 pixels. What is the area? (Use pi = 3.14, round to nearest whole number)

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A Golem is a cube-shaped enemy with 4-unit edges. What is its volume?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: Two towers form a line 150 px apart. A third tower makes a right triangle with legs 90 and 120 px. What is the hypotenuse?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A freeze aura is a circle of radius 80 px. A cannon splash is a circle of radius 60 px. What is the ratio of the aura area to the splash area?

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: The map is 1280 x 704 pixels. Each tile is 64 x 64. A diagonal path from corner to corner crosses how many pixels? (Round to nearest whole number)

questions.subject: geometry
questions.text: A tower shoots a projectile at 600 px/sec. The enemy is 280 px away and moving perpendicular at 120 px/sec. At what angle (in degrees, rounded) should the tower lead its shot?
